meridian.title: Rewriting the financial onboarding for a neobank
meridian.summary: A bilingual onboarding flow that cut drop-off in half and became the foundation of the product's identity.
meridian.services: Product Design, Brand System, Web Development
meridian.deliverables: End-to-end onboarding flow (14 screens), Design system in Figma with 120+ tokens, Next.js marketing site + dashboard shell, Brand guidelines (PDF, 48pp)
meridian.problem: Meridian°'s signup abandoned at 61% — users hit dense KYC forms before they'd seen any value. The brand was also a Latin-named spreadsheet logo with no voice.
meridian.approach1: Audited 40+ competitor flows and ran 8 user interviews in SR/EN
meridian.approach2: Rebuilt the flow as 3 progressive micro-decisions instead of one long form
meridian.approach3: Created a typographic identity system — no mascot, no stock illustration
meridian.approach4: Shipped behind a feature flag, measured, then cut over
meridian.outcome: Launched Q2 2025. Onboarding completion climbed from 39% → 58% in the first six weeks. The same typographic system now runs across their web, mobile, and support docs.
meridian.quote: They treated the onboarding like a product, not a form. The result didn't just look better — it moved the business.

kauza.title: A studio identity that made 'boring B2B' feel like a magazine
kauza.summary: Rebranded a Belgrade consultancy with an editorial voice, a custom wordmark, and a website that reads like a print piece.
kauza.roles: Creative Direction, Brand Design, Web Development
kauza.services: Brand Identity, Editorial Design, Web Development
kauza.deliverables: Custom wordmark + full type system, Brand guidelines (PDF, 62pp), Editorial website (8 templates, 4 case study layouts), Pitch deck + proposal system
kauza.problem: KAUZA had the work but not the wrapper. A consultancy doing eight-figure deals was losing pitches to worse firms with better websites. Their old site read like a 2016 agency template.
kauza.approach1: Defined an editorial voice — long-form, confident, slightly contrarian
kauza.approach2: Built a custom wordmark with a serif-to-sans weight transition
kauza.approach3: Designed the site as a magazine: masthead, features, archive
kauza.approach4: Typography-first, no stock photography, zero gradients
kauza.outcome: The rebrand shipped in Q4 2024. Qualified inbound nearly tripled in the next quarter. Three of their largest-ever clients cited the site as the reason they reached out.
kauza.quote: We didn't want a new logo. We wanted a new posture. That's what they delivered.

process.label: HOW WE WORK
process.title: From idea to launch
process.subtitle: A clear, proven process that keeps you in the loop at every step.
process.timeline: Most projects go from brief to live in 3–5 weeks.

discovery.title: We listen first.
discovery.description: We start with a free strategy call to understand your goals, audience, and competition. No templates. No assumptions.
discovery.deliverables: Project brief, Competitive analysis, Scope of work

design.title: We design with intent.
design.description: Wireframes, moodboards, and high-fidelity mockups — all aligned to your brand and business objectives. You review and we refine.

build.title: We build fast. We build right.
build.description: Clean, performant code. Mobile-first. SEO-ready from day one. You see progress weekly — no black boxes.
build.deliverables: Staging environment, Weekly check-ins, Optimized build

launch.title: We don't disappear.
launch.description: We handle deployment, final QA, and post-launch monitoring. After launch, we stay available for fixes, updates, and growth.

process.pageSubtitle: A clear, proven process that takes your project from idea to reality — on time and on budget.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: How long does a project take?
faq.a1: Most projects take 3–5 weeks from brief to launch. Complex applications may take longer — we'll give you a clear timeline during the discovery phase.
faq.q2: What do I need to provide?
faq.a2: Just your vision and goals. We handle everything else — from content strategy to design to development. If you have existing brand assets, even better.
faq.a3: Yes. Every project includes 2 revision rounds during the design phase. We iterate until you're completely satisfied.
faq.q4: Can I see progress before launch?
faq.a4: Absolutely. You'll have access to a staging environment with weekly updates. No surprises — you're involved at every step.

process.cta: Ready to start? Book your free call.

scheduler.title: Let's talk about your project
scheduler.subtitle: Book a free 30-minute strategy call. We'll map your project, call out what we'd do first, and leave you with a plan — whether you hire us or not.

about.label: ABOUT US
about.title: We are UN Design
about.description: UN Design is a premium design studio helping startups and ambitious businesses turn ideas into high-performing digital products — from first pixel to final launch.
about.story: We believe great digital products start with understanding your goals. We combine strategic thinking with creative execution to deliver work that not only looks stunning but performs exceptionally.
about.storyMore: Whether you're a startup looking for your first brand identity or an established business ready to level up your digital presence, we're here to help you make an impact.

craft.title: Craft over speed
craft.description: We don't rush. Every pixel, every line of code, every decision is intentional.

transparency.title: Radical transparency
transparency.description: No black boxes. You see our work, our process, and our thinking — at every step.

results.title: Results that matter
results.description: Beautiful design is nothing without performance. We measure success by your success.

promise.title: Our promise
promise.items: Pixel-perfect attention to detail, Clear communication throughout, On-time delivery, Post-launch support included

contact.label: CONTACT

servicesPage.title: What we do
servicesPage.subtitle: From branding to full-stack development — we bring your vision to life with pixel-perfect precision.

web.title: Web Design & Development
web.hook: Your website is your most powerful salesperson. Let's make it work harder.
web.description: We build fast, modern, and scalable websites and web applications using cutting-edge technologies. Every line of code is crafted for performance, accessibility, and SEO.
web.includes: Corporate & business websites, E-commerce platforms, Responsive web applications, Custom CMS & dashboards
web.why: Your website is the first thing people see. A fast, beautiful, well-built site builds trust and converts visitors into clients.

uiux.title: UI / UX Design
uiux.hook: Good design is invisible. Bad design is everywhere.
uiux.description: User-centered design that combines beauty with usability. We research, prototype, test, and refine until every interaction feels intuitive.
uiux.includes: User research & personas, Wireframes & prototypes, Interaction design, Usability testing & analytics
uiux.why: Great UX reduces friction, increases engagement, and turns casual visitors into loyal customers.

branding.title: Branding & Graphic Design
branding.hook: Your brand is how people feel about you when you're not in the room.
branding.description: We build brands that resonate. From strategy and naming to visual identity — cohesive brand systems that make your business unforgettable.
branding.includes: Logo design & variations, Typography & color systems, Brand guidelines & style guide, Marketing collateral & social media
branding.approach2: Define your brand personality and voice
branding.approach3: Create a complete visual identity system
branding.why: A strong brand is the foundation of everything. It builds trust, recognition, and emotional connection with your audience.

app.title: Application Development
app.hook: From idea to App Store — we handle the entire journey.
app.description: Native and cross-platform mobile applications built for performance. We handle everything from concept and UX to development and store submission.
app.includes: Cross-platform mobile apps, Native iOS & Android, API development & integration, App Store optimization
app.approach1: Map your app's core user flows
app.approach2: Build an MVP and iterate fast
app.why: A well-built app extends your reach to millions of mobile users and creates a direct channel to your customers.
